title: Russian Su-57 Deploys Advanced Radar Jamming Against Ukrainian Fighters
summary: Russian Su-57 Felon stealth fighter deploys powerful electronic warfare pod. Ukrainian pilots report severe radar disruptions during intercepts. Event highlights escalation in air defense tactics.
contents:
## Russian Su-57 Deploys Advanced Radar Jamming Against Ukrainian Fighters

### Overview
Russian Su-57 Felon stealth fighter deploys powerful electronic warfare pod. Ukrainian pilots report severe radar disruptions during intercepts. Event highlights escalation in air defense tactics.

### Event Details
ELINT News reports Russian Air Force Su-57 Felon stealth fighters deploy Khibiny-57 electronic warfare pods during recent operations over Ukraine. Ukrainian Su-27 and MiG-29 pilots encounter massive radar jamming, blinding onboard systems and ground radars for minutes. Videos shared on Telegram show Su-57s maneuvering at low altitudes while emitting high-power interference signals across X-band and S-band frequencies. Russian pilots activate pods to shield S-400 missile batteries from Ukrainian AGM-88 HARM antiradiation missiles. Ukrainian forces launch multiple HARMs in response, but jamming disrupts 80% of incoming threats according to preliminary assessments. Su-57s patrol Donetsk frontline, supporting Iskander missile strikes on Ukrainian airfields. Electronic warfare suite on Su-57 generates 10-15 kW of directed energy, overwhelming enemy seekers. Event occurs amid intensified Russian air campaign following Ukrainian drone attacks on Crimea. Western analysts confirm pod deployment through ELINT intercepts and satellite imagery from Maxar. Ukrainian Air Force commander acknowledges disruptions, accelerates procurement of next-gen ECM upgrades. Russian MoD releases footage of Su-57 evading mock NATO F-35 signatures in drills. Deployment marks first combat use of upgraded Khibiny system, shifts air superiority dynamics. Incidents cluster around Avdiivka sector where Russian forces advance 2 km daily. ELINT News sources video from Russian Su-57 pilot channel verified by OSINT community.

### Source Context
@ELINTNews (ELINT News) covers this category of developments. The account focuses on military aircraft radar deployment electronic warfare missile launch breaking.
